scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,remotion -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @lyric-af/api" "npm run dev -w @lyric-af/worker" "npm run dev -w @lyric-af/remotion"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @lyric-af/schemas && npm run build -w @lyric-af/storage && npm run build -w @lyric-af/ffmpeg && npm run build -w @lyric-af/api && npm run build -w @lyric-af/worker
